hero.title: Reliable legal support for individuals and businesses
hero.subtitle: Expert advice and representation in property and contract law — clear, discreet, and effective.
hero.micro: Confidential • No obligation on first contact

about.title: Professional and trustworthy
about.lead: The office has been operating independently since January 2023, following years of experience in legal practice in Split.
about.bullet1: Graduated from the Faculty of Law in Split (2016)
about.bullet3: My work is based on responsibility, confidentiality, and clear communication
about.focus: Focus: property and land registry law, contract law, drafting/analysis of contracts, and representation in court and out-of-court proceedings.

pillar2.title: Confidentiality
pillar2.desc: Discretion and protection of client interests.

services.title: Practice areas
services.desc: I provide legal services to individuals and legal entities in the following areas:

property.title: Property & land registry law
property.desc: Ownership, co-ownership, registrations and land registry regulation.

contract.title: Contract law
contract.desc: Drafting and analysis of contracts and contractual disputes.

inheritance.title: Inheritance law
inheritance.desc: Counseling and representation in probate proceedings.

admin.title: Administrative law
admin.desc: Representation in proceedings before competent authorities.

enforcement.title: Enforcement law
enforcement.desc: Preparation and management of enforcement and debt collection.

labor.title: Labor law
labor.desc: Counseling and representation of employers and employees.

contact.title: Request a consultation
contact.desc: Send a brief description of your inquiry. I respond as soon as possible, usually within 24 hours.
contact.note: Prior arrangement is required for client reception.

form.title: Send inquiry
form.subtitle: I respond as soon as possible.
